headline: Is It Too Late To Consider United Rentals (URI) After Its Strong Multi Year Rally?
summary: Investors may be wondering if United Rentals at around US$933.95 is starting to look expensive, or if there is still value on the table for long term investors. The stock has been volatile recently, with a 3% decline over the last 7 days, a 27.6% return over the last 30 days, 10.5% year to date, and 44.6% over the last year. The 3 year and 5 year returns sit at 181.6% and 184.0% respectively. These moves have renewed interest in how the current price lines up against underlying fundamentals...
